profile.name: Riya Tilwani
profile.title: Senior full-stack engineer for backend-heavy products and AI workflows
profile.summary: I build product systems across backend, full-stack, AI workflows, and technical leadership for startup teams that need senior ownership from ambiguous idea to reliable software.
profile.availability: Open to remote startup consulting, fractional technical leadership, and senior contract work across backend-heavy products, AI workflows, and internal tools.

services.title: AI product engineering
services.description: Designing and shipping AI-backed product workflows where model output has to become reliable, editable, and useful inside a real business process.
services.proof: Problem framing, data boundaries, evaluation loops, human review, reliability, and rollout

services.title: Backend-heavy product work
services.description: Owning APIs, databases, checkout flows, payment integrations, subscriptions, document generation, dashboards, and deployment pipelines.
services.proof: Data modelling, API boundaries, queues, payments, observability, deployment, and scale

services.title: Senior execution for startups
services.description: Turning incomplete product direction into shippable systems, reviewing architecture, managing developers, and making pragmatic build decisions.
services.proof: Architecture reviews, tradeoff calls, team coordination, delivery planning, and hands-on implementation

projects.name: AI-powered creator widget platform
projects.summary: Developing an AI-powered dev platform for creator widgets, focused on turning AI-processed SVG and Lottie assets into reusable interactive units through a pipeline-driven ingestion flow.
projects.challenge: The product needs a massive library of creator-ready widgets, but building each widget manually would be slow, repetitive, and hard to scale. The platform has to ingest generated visual assets, normalize them, preserve interaction metadata, and keep the workflow flexible while the product direction is still evolving.
projects.outcome: Owning the platform architecture and full-stack implementation for a pipeline that reduces manual widget-building effort, supports repeatable asset processing, and gives the team a faster path from AI-generated visual material to usable creator tooling.

projects.name: Ledger Lens local-first finance explainer
projects.summary: Built a local-first personal finance explainer that ingests CSV and text-based PDF bank statements, sanitizes private transaction text, embeds evidence locally, and stores transaction context in LanceDB.
projects.challenge: Raw bank data is sensitive, so the project avoids sending original statement text to external models. Financial facts are computed deterministically, while retrieval and optional LLM layers are limited to explaining sanitized evidence.
projects.outcome: Created a Python CLI flow for statement ingestion, local transaction records, deterministic spending patterns, evidence retrieval, and a clear privacy boundary before any external LLM explanation is introduced.

projects.name: India Stock Discovery Agent
projects.summary: Adapted the xai_finance_agent starter into a trust-first Indian equity research app for building an investor profile, applying suitability guardrails, discovering stocks to research, and journaling decisions.
projects.challenge: The app needed to support research without drifting into buy/sell recommendations, so risk controls and suitability labels had to come from deterministic application logic rather than prompt-only behavior.
projects.outcome: Built a FastAPI backend and Vite React frontend with investor-profile capture, native Python guardrails, Indian stock research candidates, and a local decision journal for watchlist, skipped, and bought ideas.

projects.name: Satsang Lekhan Hindi transcription PWA
projects.summary: Built a progressive web app for long-form Hindi speech-to-text during satsang and similar spoken sessions, using browser audio capture, Firebase Cloud Functions, and Bhashini ASR.
projects.challenge: The product needed to work for long spoken sessions on mobile, keep chapters editable and synced per family member, and handle Hindi dictation conventions such as spoken punctuation and paragraph commands.
projects.outcome: Delivered an installable React PWA with automatic audio chunking, WebM-to-WAV conversion, Bhashini transcription, Google sign-in, Firestore chapter sync, local autosave, copy, print, export, and per-user security rules.

projects.name: Marketplace checkout and pricing services
projects.summary: Worked on RESTful microservices powering checkout and pricing business logic for a global ecommerce marketplace with high traffic, regulatory constraints, and fraud-risk considerations.
projects.challenge: Marketplace systems have to stay reliable under peak demand while coordinating pricing, checkout, asynchronous messaging, compliance concerns, and deployment safety across multiple services.
projects.outcome: Owned development and upkeep across backend services using Golang, Node.js, Postgres, DynamoDB, Kafka, SQS, AWS, Kubernetes, CircleCI, Harness, and Datadog.

projects.name: Legal transcription SaaS with context-aware AI
projects.summary: Built a subscription web app for a law firm to upload audio files and produce documents through a fine-tuned, context-aware speech-to-text workflow.
projects.challenge: The product needed legal-context accuracy, a smooth upload-to-document flow, subscription tiers, and cloud delivery without making operations heavy for the client.
projects.outcome: Delivered the SaaS workflow with Stripe subscriptions, React UI, Django backend, a fine-tuned Whisper flow for legal context, and AWS CloudFront distribution.

projects.name: Business report automation with generated charts and PDFs
projects.summary: Built a web app that turns user inputs and uploaded CSV files into customizable business reports with generated copy, charts, images, live previews, and PDF export.
projects.challenge: The system needed to combine creative generation with deterministic document production. Users needed template control and version history without losing the speed benefits of AI-generated drafts.
projects.outcome: Delivered a full-stack report builder using Grok AI for content, OpenAI for chart generation, MongoDB for versions, and Fileforge for PDF generation.

projects.name: Enterprise assistant with self-hostable deployment
projects.summary: Built a self-hostable AI assistant for enterprise teams that needed data control, internal search, speech input, and code execution without depending on a single hosted vendor.
projects.challenge: The product had to feel like a modern assistant while staying deployable in controlled environments. The hard parts were model portability, data retention boundaries, real-time search, and safely turning assistant output into executable workflows.
projects.outcome: Delivered a Chainlit-based assistant with open-source LLM support, PostgreSQL-backed persistence, Tavily web search, Whisper speech-to-text, and LLM sandbox execution.

experience.description: Building an AI-powered dev platform and product infrastructure for live streamers and content creators, with ownership across product decisions, architecture, backend systems, frontend workflows, and integrations.
highlights: Developing a pipeline-driven ingestion flow for AI-processed SVG and Lottie widgets to reduce the manual effort of building a large creator widget library.
Turning ambiguous creator workflows into product surfaces that can support live, high-pressure usage.
Owning full-stack implementation while keeping the architecture flexible enough for rapid early-stage iteration.
Working close to product direction and founder priorities to move from idea to usable creator tooling quickly.

experience.description: Leading development and delivery of core products with a focus on scalable, maintainable solutions while balancing hands-on engineering, DevOps ownership, and architecture decisions.
highlights: Managing a small team of part-time developers and keeping execution efficient through lightweight processes.
Owning product architecture, backend systems, deployment pipelines, and hands-on delivery.
Experimenting with AI and automation workflows for client-facing product and operational needs.

experience.description: Built AI-first SaaS and enterprise applications across transcription, business report generation, and self-hostable conversational assistants.
highlights: Shipped a subscription transcription product using a fine-tuned Whisper workflow and Stripe.
Built a business report generation app with generated content, charts, templates, live previews, version control, and PDF export.
Developed an enterprise AI assistant with Chainlit, open-source LLM support, Tavily search, Whisper input, and sandboxed code execution.

experience.description: Worked on RESTful microservices powering checkout and pricing business logic for a global ecommerce marketplace.
highlights: Led development and upkeep of services across checkout and pricing logic.
Managed deployments with CircleCI, Harness, Kubernetes, and AWS, with Datadog for performance and availability.
Built domain depth across marketplace operations, regulatory compliance, peak traffic performance, scalability, and fraud prevention.

experience.context: High-scale mobility and EV product engineering
experience.description: Built customer-facing web and backend systems for Ola Electric, including payments, test-ride workflows, and service deployment.
highlights: Led external contractors building Ola Electric's official website.
Integrated Adyen and PayU payment flows using React, Node.js, Java Spring Boot, and MySQL.
Built a Java Spring Boot test-ride service for scheduled and on-demand rides using MySQL and Scylla.
Conducted 50+ interviews and mentored new joiners for the web development team.

experience.companyContext: European travel technology company · India engineering office
experience.description: Developed and maintained internal web applications for scheduling and activation of production changes and software loads across the organization.
highlights: Worked on enterprise web application development in a large European travel technology environment.
Built and maintained MEAN-stack workflows used for internal production-change coordination.

testimonials.quote: Riya has been an incredible asset to our team, seamlessly managing projects while contributing to both front-end and back-end development. Her proactive approach and ability to 'just get things done' set her apart from others we've worked with. Riya's technical expertise, combined with her sharp project management skills, ensured that everything ran smoothly and ahead of schedule.
testimonials.author: Josh G.

testimonials.quote: Riya is an exceptional full stack developer who consistently impresses us. Her expertise spans front-end, back-end, and database management, allowing her to handle entire projects independently. Riya's work quality is consistently top-notch, delivering high-quality code throughout the application.
testimonials.author: Kevin K.

resumeLab.summary: A private resume workspace that stores experience, project evidence, skills, testimonials, and role preferences so each application can produce a crisp ATS-friendly resume.
principles: One clean layout, many tailored versions
resumeTips: Make the first third of the resume answer level, domain, and current value.
Use a simple one-column structure with standard section names.
Put the newest and strongest experience first, with enough context to show seniority.
Write bullets as action, scope, and business or technical relevance.
Use firm verbs such as owned, led, built, shipped, designed, integrated, and managed.
Avoid vague claims unless there is evidence attached to the same line.
Keep skills grouped by capability instead of dumping every tool into one list.
Use exact keywords recruiters search for, but only where the experience supports them.
Keep links clean: email, LinkedIn, GitHub, and a portfolio domain are enough.
Make the PDF text-selectable and avoid graphics, tables, photos, keyword-stuffing sections, and complex layouts.
